content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1603: Swallow each other

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

Hitesh_

Looking at Shi Yan’s evil clone in front of him, Devour felt regretful. No matter what, he could have never predicted that the other could be so fierce!

He felt that he shouldn’t have let this evil clone reach the devouring black hole that early, which had given him the chance to absorb the thick evil, negative energies in this tunnel first.

At that moment, due to an unimaginable amount of negative energies the clone had taken in, his terrifying aura was much more intense than the real body’s, giving Devour a terrible headache.

The endless negative energy gushed from every direction. Shi Yan’s savage face slowly had a layer of dark air covering it, made up of the extremely evil energy. His crimson eyes gazed at Devour’s shadows while the negative emotions gushed like water from a broken dam, hitting Devour’s shadows torrentially.

“I acknowledge your achievement...You’re really strong now. However, your Power Upanishad comes from me! Do you really think that you can use my power to destroy me?”

Devour’s voice arose in the dark like shrieking ghosts and wailing souls, capable of raising goosebumps on people’s skin.

There were nine shadows in total. As he was talking, eight of the shadows moved, surrounding one shadow in the center. Ripples of evil energies containing destruction, despair, darkness, and the other evils were released. The eight evil powers twisted together like a rope, creating a strong, pure, and of course, intimidating power.

The immense negative energy released by Shi Yan was hit by the rings of eight evil energies and got pushed aside, unable to reach the shadow in the center.

“I will show you my territory...” Devour smirked coldly.

Thick, black clouds emerged, revealing a territory of coldness, brute, frenzy, and isolation above his head.

That world changed slowly. The sky was dyed black as if someone had used ink to fill it while the ground was a bloody land. At first glimpse, the place was filled with gory dismembered bodies; death, destruction, despair, darkness, chaos, corpse Qi, and spooky ghost lanterns ruled this world, appearing in every corner...

As long as it was a creature with a pure heart, its soul would shatter after just a glance at that world.

It was the most terrifying territory in this world, the fountainhead of evil in Devour’s inner world. He had guarded this place for years, not letting even the members of the Devouring Clan visit this place.

No creature was born in that world, and actually, it shouldn’t even exist...

Even when Zi Yao faced Devour’s territory, her soul quivered in fright. She had tried using her holy, purifying divine light to filter and clean that filthy, evil world, but didn’t succeed.

Between the heaven and earth of this vast sea of stars, no creature could stand still in front of Devour’s territory, no matter how strong it was.

Desolate was the God of War in the Absolute Beginning Era, the strongest warrior at that time. However, when even he faced Devour, he was afraid of the latter’s territory. Desolate didn’t have any means to ensure that his soul wouldn’t be affected by it. Devour’s territory could arise and magnify the evil in someone’s heart, making him lose himself in that extreme world.

All creatures with a soul would have very complicated seven emotions and six desires, all having an evil facet of their existence. As long as they had even a wisp of evil thought, this territory could affect them easily.

And at this moment, Shi Yan’s evil clone was in an extreme state. This clone carried Shi Yan’s expectations with the imprint of Devouring power Upanishad and the eight evil powers. It also contained all of Shi Yan’s evilness in his inner world. After a period of constantly taking in evil energy, this clone of Shi Yan could be now deemed as the evilest creature in this world!

Shi Yan didn’t have even a wisp of humane disposition in his heart; this clone of his was purely evil. As he was watching Devour’s territory, his mind wasn’t affected at all. On the contrary, he laughed excitedly and loudly!

“The power I used couldn’t affect you because we share the same origin. Similarly, how could your territory affect me?” Pounding his chest, Shi Yan pulled a ferocious face, grinning fiendishly. “I have no good thought in my heart. This body of mine is made of evilness in my inner world. I’m the devil!”

Devour’s territory floated up from his head, flying toward Shi Yan.

In response, Shi Yan crackled heartlessly, touching his glabella. Instantly, a black hole emerged and turned into a massive vortex, spinning frantically.

“When you and I are fighting, the eight evil powers are of no use. Only the Devouring power Upanishad will decide the winner! You and I, one of us will be destroyed to complete the other. You swallow me or I will swallow you! It’s the best way to fight between us!”

The black hole flew out of his glabella, looking exactly like the Devouring Power Upanishad Origin where they were staying in this dark void. While Devour pulled a dark face, Shi Yan urged his power again. Eight islands of the eight evil powers flew out, circling the black hole.

He had forced the tier of Power Upanishad in his soul altar, gathering all of the power to operate the black hole!

Swoosh! Swoosh! Swoosh!

The tremendous suction force filled each corner of the world as the flood of negative energy in this tunnel gushed torrentially.

“You’re right...The result of the battle between us will end with either you or me dying. We’re going to swallow each other. It’s the best fighting method, indeed.”

Devour recognized that his territory wasn’t effective in the fight against Shi Yan.

Their power, Power Upanishad, and evil mind were almost the same. In this situation, using the eight evil powers to attack each other wasn’t really effective on either of them, since the thicker negative energy couldn’t affect their minds.

Only devouring could finish all of this, completely destroying one of them!

Devour’s clones gathered, turning into a massive black hole. This black hole was identical with Shi Yan’s, and even the eight gory islands spinning around looked alike!

“Come here!” Shi Yan roared crazily as the evil clone leaped up, then plunged into his black hole.

It was like the tongue of a black demon!

Hovering in the black hole, Shi Yan watched another black hole in front of him, feeling the energy emit from Devour. Shi Yan’s clone suddenly shivered intensely as the extremely thick negative energy gushed from his acupuncture points, which enlarged the black hole significantly.

BOOM!

After his black hole had expanded, it attacked proactively! Explosions echoed when the black hole opened like the mouth of a demon, trying to swallow Devour’s black hole.

In the next instant, Devour’s black hole and the eight bloody islands were swallowed completely. The soul power, as well as the bloodthirsty and chaotic thoughts Devour had accumulated for billions of years erupted like a volcano!

Together, they expanded inside Shi Yan’s massive black hole, which swelled up like an over-inflated balloon. Shi Yan immediately felt the evil, negative energy, which was more brutal, and felt like the most terrifying bomb in this world. It was about to detonate in his body, smashing his entire being!

Shi Yan discolored in fear as he immediately urged the Devouring power Upanishad to digest Devour’s fierce power. However, as soon as he took action, he recognized a suction force that was enough to swallow the entire world rumblingly emerge from inside his body.

At this moment, he felt so strange, as if his body was being nibbled at from the inside.

It seemed that a hungry demon was just born inside him, which was greedily bitting and chewing off his blood, flesh, internal organs, and bones. It wanted to eat him from the inside!

He suddenly understood one thing: the ones he had swallowed using the black hole while his Devouring power Upanishad was working had to experience the feelings he felt right now.

...The feeling of being eaten up little by little!

“Oh?”

Another strange feeling arose as his soul that made him joyful. It was the wonderful feeling when the Devouring power Upanishad was gathering energy!

His Devouring power Upanishad was frantically working to swallow everything. It felt like he had a big mouth that was enjoying delicious meals. It was a familiar, satisfying feeling, indeed!

He was also swallowing Devour!

His body was chewed off while his Devouring power Upanishad was taking in Devour’s energy!

They were swallowing each other!

Shortly, Shi Yan realized that Devour was having the same experience and feeling he had just got. The other was in the same situation as his power was being digested!

The two of them were like two beasts biting and tearing each other to eat pieces of flesh they could take. They both had to bear wounds and refill their power at the same time!

This was the harshest battle of endurance!

“Oh good! Still good!”

As he understood, he wasn’t tense anymore. He relaxed the burden in his mind, focusing his power, mind and soul to control the Devouring power Upanishad.

This battle would take a long time. Who would survive to control the origin of all evilness in this world with the Devouring Power Upanishad Origin? This battle would give the answer.

Shi Yan’s clone’s situation in this battle was different from the host body which had entered the Star Power Upanishad Origin. In this place, he was neither in a disadvantageous nor an advantageous situation...

The Devouring Power Upanishad Origin didn’t favor either one of them. After Devour entered, it still didn’t give up on Shi Yan completely, because the Devouring power Upanishad in this clone came from Devour, and was a genuine evil Power Upanishad. At the same time, he was at the Third Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm, which wasn’t lower than Devour. This body was created by Shi Yan’s Absolute Beginning blood, and it had all of Shi Yan’s evil thoughts.

Moreover, Shi Yan’s clone had come here earlier, which had given him time to collect a large amount of evil power and fill the gap with Devour.

No matter it was realm, power, bloodline, or understanding of the Power Upanishad, this clone wasn’t less powerful than Devour. All of these had made the Devouring Power Upanishad Origin consider him at the same level with Devour. Thus, it didn’t favor either of them.

This battle was of two equal powers!
